grammarPoints.subject: english
grammarPoints.title: Why? and Because
grammarPoints.rule: Use 'why' to ask about cause or reason, and use 'because' to state the reason or cause in the answer.

intro_examples.text: Why does a giraffe have a long neck? Because it eats leaves at the top of trees.
intro_examples.jp: なぜキリンは首が長いのですか？ 木の一番上の葉を食べるからです。

intro_examples.text: Why don't you like penguins? Because they look silly, and they can't fly!
intro_examples.jp: なぜペンギンが嫌いなのですか？ 風変わりに見えるし、飛べないからです！

table.title: Using Why? and Because

cells: Why does a polar bear cover its black nose?
Because it wants to hide in the snow.
Ask and answer about reasons for positive actions
Because they have eight legs and look scary.
Ask and answer about reasons for negative feelings/actions
Why do crocodiles have sharp teeth?
Ask and answer about plural animals or things

notes: Always use 'Why' to ask for a reason.
Always start your reason with 'Because' to explain 'Why'.
Be careful to match do/does with singular/plural subjects.

tab1_samples.text: Why does a giraffe have a long neck?
tab1_samples.jp: なぜキリンは首が長いのですか？

tab1_samples.text: Because it eats leaves at the top of trees.
tab1_samples.jp: 木の一番上の葉を食べるからです。

tab1_samples.text: Why don't you like penguins?
tab1_samples.jp: なぜペンギンが嫌いなのですか？

tab1_samples.text: Because they look silly, and they can't fly!
tab1_samples.jp: 風変わりに見えるし、飛べないからです！

tab1_samples.text: Why do jaguars have spots?
tab1_samples.jp: なぜジャガーには斑点があるのですか？

tab1_samples.text: Because they need to hide in the trees.
tab1_samples.jp: 木の中に隠れる必要があるからです。

tab1_samples.text: Why does a polar bear cover its black nose?
tab1_samples.jp: なぜホッキョクグマは黒い鼻を覆うのですか？

tab1_samples.text: Because it wants to hide in the snow.
tab1_samples.jp: 雪の中に隠れたいからです。

tab1_samples.text: Why do crocodiles have sharp teeth?
tab1_samples.jp: なぜワニには鋭い歯があるのですか？

tab1_samples.text: Because they eat meat.
tab1_samples.jp: 肉を食べるからです。

rules.title: Use Why to ask for a reason
rules.jp_title: 理由を尋ねるには Why を使う
rules.subtitle: Use 'Why' at the beginning of a question when you want to know the cause or reason for something.
rules.jp_subtitle: 何かの原因や理由を知りたいときは、疑問文の最初に「Why」を使います。

transforms.to: Why are owls active at night?

examples.jp: なぜ鳥は巣を作るのですか？

examples.text: Why does an owl have big eyes?
examples.jp: なぜフクロウは大きな目を持っているのですか？

rules.title: Use Because to answer Why
rules.jp_title: Why に答えるには Because を使う
rules.subtitle: Begin your answer with 'Because' to explain the reason or cause clearly.
rules.jp_subtitle: 理由や原因をはっきりと説明するために、答えは「Because」で始めます。

transforms.to: Because they need a warm place.
Because it wants to catch insects.

examples.text: Because it wants to stay warm.
examples.jp: 体を温かく保ちたいからです。

examples.text: Because they need to run fast.
examples.jp: 速く走る必要があるからです。

rules.title: Match do and does in questions
rules.jp_title: 疑問文の do と does を一致させる
rules.subtitle: Use 'does' with singular subjects (an ostrich, a giraffe) and 'do' with plural subjects (ostriches, giraffes).
rules.jp_subtitle: 単数形の名詞（an ostrich、a giraffeなど）には「does」を使い、複数形の名詞（ostriches、giraffesなど）には「do」を使います。

transforms.from: Why do an ostrich have long legs?
transforms.to: Why does an ostrich have long legs?

examples.text: Why does an ostrich have long legs?
examples.jp: なぜダチョウは長い脚を持っているのですか？
なぜハチは巣を作るのですか？

rules.title: Use don't/doesn't for negative reasons
rules.jp_title: 否定の理由には don't/doesn't を使う
rules.subtitle: Use 'don't' or 'doesn't' in the question to ask why someone does NOT like or do something.
rules.jp_subtitle: 誰かが何かを好きではない、または行わない理由を尋ねるには、疑問文の中に「don't」や「doesn't」を使います。

transforms.from: Why do you not like bats?
Why does she not walk to school?
transforms.to: Why doesn't she walk to school?

examples.jp: なぜコウモリが嫌いなのですか？

examples.text: Why doesn't a polar bear live in the desert?
examples.jp: なぜホッキョクグマは砂漠に住んでいないのですか？

mixed_samples.text: Why do spiders make webs?
mixed_samples.jp: なぜクモは巣を作るのですか？

mixed_samples.text: Because they catch insects in them.
mixed_samples.jp: 巣で虫を捕まえるからです。

mixed_samples.text: Why do birds make nests?
mixed_samples.jp: なぜ鳥は巣を作るのですか？

mixed_samples.text: Because they lay their eggs and raise their babies in them.
mixed_samples.jp: 巣の中で卵を産み、赤ちゃんを育てるからです。

mixed_samples.text: Why do bees make hives?
mixed_samples.jp: なぜハチは巣を作るのですか？

mixed_samples.text: Because they need a place to keep their honey.
mixed_samples.jp: ハチミツを保管する場所が必要だからです。

mixed_samples.text: Why do people live in houses?
mixed_samples.jp: なぜ人々は家に住むのですか？

mixed_samples.text: Because we need a place to stay warm and safe.
mixed_samples.jp: 温かく安全に過ごす場所が必要だからです。

mixed_samples.text: Why do you like parrots?
mixed_samples.jp: なぜオウムが好きなのですか？

mixed_samples.text: Because they're colorful and smart!
mixed_samples.jp: カラフルで賢いからです！

stem: does a giraffe have a long neck?

explanation.title: Asking with Why
explanation.body: Always use 'Why' to ask for a reason or cause.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜキリンは首が長いのですか？

stem: it wants to hide in the snow.

explanation.title: Answering with Because
explanation.body: Start your reason with 'Because' to explain why something happens.

tab3_quiz.jp: 雪の中に隠れたいからです。

explanation.title: Plural do
explanation.body: Jaguars is a plural subject, so we use 'do' in the question.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜジャガーには斑点があるのですか？

stem: a polar bear cover its black nose?

explanation.title: Singular does
explanation.body: A polar bear is a singular subject, so we use 'does' in the question.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜホッキョクグマは黒い鼻を覆うのですか？

explanation.title: Negative don't
explanation.body: With 'you', we use 'don't' to ask a negative question.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜペンギンが嫌いなのですか？

explanation.title: Negative doesn't
explanation.body: With singular 'she', we use 'doesn't' to ask a negative question.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜ彼女は洞窟が嫌いなのですか？

explanation.title: Base verb form
explanation.body: Questions with 'do/does' must use the base form of the verb, which is 'have'.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜワニには鋭い歯があるのですか？

explanation.title: Base verb form with does
explanation.body: Even with 'does', we use the base form 'have' in the question.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜフクロウは大きな目を持っているのですか？

stem: they need a place to keep honey.

explanation.title: Because for complete clauses
explanation.body: Since the reason is a complete clause with a subject ('they') and a verb ('need'), we start with 'Because'.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜハチは巣を作るのですか？ハチミツを保管する場所が必要だからです。

explanation.title: Plural do for ostriches
explanation.body: Ostriches is plural, so we use 'do' in the question.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜダチョウは長い脚を持っているのですか？

answers: Why does a polar bear cover its nose?
Why does polar bears cover their noses?

explanation.title: Singular subject verb agreement
explanation.body: 'Why does a polar bear...' is correct because 'a polar bear' is singular.

tab4_master.jp: どの質問が「does」を正しく使っていますか？

stem: Which sentence is a correct answer to a 'Why' question?

explanation.title: Starting answers with Because
explanation.body: Answers explaining why should start with 'Because' followed by a subject and a verb.

tab4_master.jp: どの文が「Why」の質問に対する正しい答えですか？

answers: Why does crocodiles have sharp teeth?
Why do crocodiles have sharp teeth?

explanation.title: Plural question agreement
explanation.body: 'Why does crocodiles...' is incorrect because 'crocodiles' is plural and needs 'do'.

tab4_master.jp: 正しくない文を選んでください。

stem: Complete the conversation: '______ don't you like spiders?' '______ they are scary!'

explanation.title: Why and Because pair
explanation.body: Use 'Why' for the question and 'Because' for the answer.

tab4_master.jp: 会話を完成させてください：「なぜクモが嫌いなのですか？」「怖いからです！」

stem: Complete: Why ______ an owl have big eyes?

explanation.title: Singular owl does
explanation.body: 'an owl' is singular, so it uses 'does'.

tab4_master.jp: 完成させてください：なぜフクロウは大きな目を持っているのですか？

tab4_master.cue: Build the question about giraffe necks.
tab4_master.jp: なぜキリンは首が長いのですか？
木の一番上の葉を食べるからです。

tab4_master.cue: Build the negative question about penguins.
tab4_master.jp: なぜペンギンが嫌いなのですか？
風変わりに見えるし、飛べないからです！
なぜクモは巣を作るのですか？

japanese.title: Why? と Because
japanese.rule: 「なぜ」と理由を尋ねるときは Why を使い、その理由を答えるときは Because から文を始めます。
japanese.pattern: Why + do/does/don't ...? Because + 主語 + 動詞 ...

examples.sentence: Why does a giraffe have a long neck?
Because it eats leaves at the top of trees.
Why don't you like penguins?
Because they look silly, and they can't fly!
Why do jaguars have spots?
Because they need to hide in the trees.
Why does a polar bear cover its black nose?
Because it wants to hide in the snow.
Why do crocodiles have sharp teeth?
Because they eat meat.
Why do spiders make webs?
Because they catch insects in them.
Why do birds make nests?
Because they lay their eggs and raise their babies in them.
Why do bees make hives?
Because they need a place to keep their honey.
Why do people live in houses?
Because we need a place to stay warm and safe.
Why do you like parrots?
Because they're colorful and smart!

source.note: Workbook page 20-21 answer keys used for why/because logic.

grammarPoints.subject: english
grammarPoints.title: Infinitive of Purpose
grammarPoints.rule: Use 'to + verb' (infinitive of purpose) to describe how or why someone or something does an action to reach a goal.

intro_examples.text: Giraffes use their long tongues to clean their ears.
intro_examples.jp: キリンは耳をきれいにするために長い舌を使います。

intro_examples.text: Goats use their horns to fight.
intro_examples.jp: ヤギは戦うために角を使います。

table.title: Using Infinitive of Purpose
notes: Always use the base form of the verb after 'to'.
Make sure use/uses matches singular/plural subjects.

tab1_samples.text: Giraffes use their long tongues to clean their ears.
tab1_samples.jp: キリンは耳をきれいにするために長い舌を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Goats use their horns to fight.
tab1_samples.jp: ヤギは戦うために角を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Zebras use their black and white fur to hide in the grasslands.
tab1_samples.jp: シマウマは草原で隠れるために白黒の毛皮を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Cats use their tongues to clean their fur.
tab1_samples.jp: 猫は毛皮をきれいにするために舌を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Kangaroos use their pouches to carry their babies.
tab1_samples.jp: カンガルーは赤ちゃんを運ぶために袋を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Elephants use their long trunks to shower.
tab1_samples.jp: ゾウはシャワーを浴びるために長い鼻を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Tigers use their sharp teeth to eat meat.
tab1_samples.jp: トラは肉を食べるために鋭い歯を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Penguins use their wings to swim in the ocean.
tab1_samples.jp: ペンギンは海で泳ぐために翼を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Bears use their fur to stay warm.
tab1_samples.jp: クマは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。

tab1_samples.text: Lions use their sharp claws to catch other animals.
tab1_samples.jp: ライオンは他の動物を捕まえるために鋭い爪を使います。

rules.title: Use to + base verb form
rules.jp_title: to + 動詞の原形を使う
rules.subtitle: Always use the simple base form of the verb after 'to'. Do not add '-s' or '-ing'.
rules.jp_subtitle: 「to」の後は常にシンプルな動詞の原形を使います。-s や -ing は付けません。

transforms.from: Ostriches use their long legs to running fast.
transforms.to: Ostriches use their long legs to run fast.

transforms.from: Parrots use their wings to flies.
transforms.to: Parrots use their wings to fly.

examples.text: Ostriches use their long legs to run fast.
examples.jp: ダチョウは速く走るために長い脚を使います。

examples.text: Parrots use their wings to fly.
examples.jp: オウムは飛ぶために翼を使います。

rules.title: Match use and uses with subjects
rules.jp_title: 主語に合わせて use と uses を使い分ける
rules.subtitle: Use 'uses' for singular subjects (A bear uses...) and 'use' for plural subjects (Bears use...).
rules.jp_subtitle: 単数の主語には「uses」を使い、複数の主語には「use」を使います。

transforms.from: A bear use its fur to stay warm.
transforms.to: A bear uses its fur to stay warm.

transforms.from: Bears uses their fur to stay warm.
transforms.to: Bears use their fur to stay warm.

examples.text: A bear uses its fur to stay warm.
examples.jp: クマは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。

examples.text: Bears use their fur to stay warm.
examples.jp: クマたちは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。

rules.title: Use it with everyday tools
rules.subtitle: You can use this grammar pattern with tools you use every day, not just animal body parts.
rules.jp_subtitle: 動物の体の部位だけでなく、毎日使う身の回りの道具に対してもこの表現を使えます。

transforms.from: I have a backpack for carrying my books.
transforms.to: I use a backpack to carry my books.

transforms.from: I need my toothbrush for cleaning my teeth.
transforms.to: I use my toothbrush to clean my teeth.

examples.text: I use a backpack to carry my books.
examples.jp: 本を持ち運ぶためにバックパックを使います。

examples.text: I use my toothbrush to clean my teeth.
examples.jp: 歯を磨くために歯ブラシを使います。

rules.title: Use to for verbs, because for clauses
rules.jp_title: 動詞には to、節（文）には because を使い分ける
rules.subtitle: Use 'to + verb' for direct purposes, but use 'because + clause' for complete reasons.
rules.jp_subtitle: 直接的な目的には「to + 動詞」を使い、完全な文による理由説明には「because」を使います。

transforms.from: Frogs use their back legs because they jump.
transforms.to: Frogs use their back legs to jump.

transforms.from: Why do penguins have wings? To they need them to swim.
transforms.to: Why do penguins have wings? Because they need them to swim.

examples.text: Frogs use their back legs to jump.
examples.jp: カエルは跳ぶために後ろ脚を使います。

examples.text: Why does an owl have big eyes? Because it needs to see at night.
examples.jp: なぜフクロウは大きな目を持っているのですか？夜に見る必要があるからです。

mixed_samples.text: Ostriches use their long legs to run fast.
mixed_samples.jp: ダチョウは速く走るために長い脚を使います。

mixed_samples.text: Parrots use their wings to fly.
mixed_samples.jp: オウムは飛ぶために翼を使います。

mixed_samples.text: Bears use their fur to stay warm.
mixed_samples.jp: クマは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。

mixed_samples.text: Lions use their sharp claws to catch other animals.
mixed_samples.jp: ライオンは他の動物を捕まえるために鋭い爪を使います。

mixed_samples.text: Elephants use their trunks to drink water.
mixed_samples.jp: ゾウは水を飲むために鼻を使います。

mixed_samples.text: I use my toothbrush to clean my teeth.
mixed_samples.jp: 歯を磨くために歯ブラシを使います。

mixed_samples.text: I use a phone to talk to my friends.
mixed_samples.jp: 友達と話すために電話を使います。

mixed_samples.text: I study and do my homework to learn.
mixed_samples.jp: 学ぶために勉強して宿題をします。

mixed_samples.text: Frogs use their long tongues to catch flies.
mixed_samples.jp: カエルはハエを捕まえるために長い舌を使います。

mixed_samples.text: Monkeys use their hands to climb.
mixed_samples.jp: サルは登るために手を使います。

explanation.title: to + verb for purpose
explanation.body: Use 'to' before the base verb 'fly' to show the purpose of the action.

tab3_quiz.jp: オウムは飛ぶために翼を使います。

stem: Zebras use their black and white fur to

explanation.title: Base verb after to
explanation.body: Always use the simple base form of the verb ('hide') after 'to' when describing purpose.

tab3_quiz.jp: シマウマは草原で隠れるために白黒の毛皮を使います。

explanation.title: Singular uses
explanation.body: 'A bear' is singular, so we use 'uses' with '-s'.

tab3_quiz.jp: クマは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。

explanation.title: Plural use
explanation.body: 'Bears' is plural, so we use 'use' without '-s'.

tab3_quiz.jp: クマたちは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。

explanation.title: to + verb for everyday tool
explanation.body: Use 'to + verb' (to carry) to explain what you use a backpack for.

tab3_quiz.jp: 本を持ち運ぶためにバックパックを使います。

stem: Why do frogs use their back legs? Frogs use their back legs

explanation.title: to + verb instead of because
explanation.body: We use 'to' followed directly by a verb ('jump') to describe purpose.

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜカエルは後ろ脚を使うのですか？カエルは跳ぶために後ろ脚を使います。

stem: Why does an owl have big eyes?
it needs to see at night.

explanation.title: Because for complete clauses
explanation.body: Because is used to connect a reason that contains a full clause ('it needs to...').

tab3_quiz.jp: なぜフクロウは大きな目を持っているのですか？夜に目にする必要があるからです。

stem: Lions use their sharp claws to

explanation.title: Base verb form catch
explanation.body: Always use the base form 'catch' after 'to'.

tab3_quiz.jp: ライオンは他の動物を捕まえるために鋭い爪を使います。

explanation.title: to + verb shower
explanation.body: 'shower' is a verb here, so we use 'to shower' to express purpose.

tab3_quiz.jp: ゾウはシャワーを浴びるために長い鼻を使います。

stem: I study and do my homework

explanation.title: to + verb learn
explanation.body: Use 'to learn' to explain the purpose of studying.

tab3_quiz.jp: 学ぶために勉強して宿題をします。

stem: Which sentence uses the infinitive of purpose correctly?
answers: Giraffes use their long tongues to clean their ears.
Giraffes use their long tongues to cleaning their ears.
Giraffes uses their long tongues to clean their ears.
Giraffes use their long tongues clean their ears.

explanation.title: Infinitive structure check
explanation.body: 'Giraffes use... to clean...' is correct because the subject is plural ('use') and 'to' is followed by the base form ('clean').

tab4_master.jp: どの文が目的の不定詞を正しく使っていますか？

stem: Complete: A polar bear uses its thick fur ______ warm.

explanation.title: to + base verb stay
explanation.body: Use 'to stay' to describe purpose.

tab4_master.jp: 完成させてください：ホッキョクグマは温かく過ごすために厚い毛皮を使います。

answers: Ostriches uses their long legs to run fast.
Ostriches use their long legs to run fast.
A bear uses its fur to stay warm.
I use my toothbrush to clean my teeth.

explanation.title: Plural subject verb agreement
explanation.body: 'Ostriches uses...' is incorrect because 'Ostriches' is plural and must use 'use'.

tab4_master.jp: 正しくない文を選んでください。

stem: What is the correct way to complete: 'Why do parrots have wings?' '______ fly.'

explanation.title: Short answer of purpose
explanation.body: You can answer a 'Why' question with 'To + verb' ('To fly') as a short answer of purpose.

tab4_master.jp: 完成させてください：「なぜオウムには翼があるのですか？」「飛ぶためです。」

stem: Complete: I use a phone ______ to my friends.

explanation.title: to + base verb talk
explanation.body: Use 'to talk' to express the purpose.

tab4_master.jp: 完成させてください：友達と話すために電話を使います。
シマウマは隠れるために白黒の毛皮を使います。
カンガルーは赤ちゃんを運ぶために袋を使います。

tab4_master.cue: Build the sentence about bear fur.
tab4_master.jp: クマは温かく過ごすために毛皮を使います。
歯を磨くために歯ブラシを使います。

tab4_master.cue: Build the short answer of purpose about owls.
tab4_master.jp: 夜に見るためです。

japanese.title: 目的を表す不定詞
japanese.rule: 「to + 動詞の原形」を使って、ある行動がどのような目的・意図のために行われるかを説明します。
japanese.pattern: 主語 + use(s) + 名詞/代名詞 + to + 動詞の原形 ...

examples.sentence: Giraffes use their long tongues to clean their ears.
Goats use their horns to fight.
Zebras use their black and white fur to hide in the grasslands.
Cats use their tongues to clean their fur.
Kangaroos use their pouches to carry their babies.
Elephants use their long trunks to shower.
Tigers use their sharp teeth to eat meat.
Penguins use their wings to swim in the ocean.
Bears use their fur to stay warm.
Lions use their sharp claws to catch other animals.
Ostriches use their long legs to run fast.
Parrots use their wings to fly.
A bear uses its fur to stay warm.
Bears use their fur to stay warm.
I use a backpack to carry my books.
I use my toothbrush to clean my teeth.
I use a phone to talk to my friends.
I study and do my homework to learn.
Frogs use their long tongues to catch flies.
Monkeys use their hands to climb.
Elephants use their trunks to drink water.
Frogs use their back legs to jump.
Why does an owl have big eyes? Because it needs to see at night.

source.note: Workbook page 22-23 answer keys used for infinitive of purpose logic.
